params.detection: highly volatile; sensed by smell and as a burn

content_blocks.body_md:
Ethanol is the one recreational drug humans have fermented for at least nine
thousand years. The body clears it at a roughly fixed rate, about one
standard drink per hour, which is why its math is a Widmark BAC curve rather
than a half-life decay.
